results.evidence: Response requires recording CVE ID/advisory URL, vulnerable/patched ranges, severity, exploitability, affected code path, before/after lockfile versions, and audit/advisory evidence.
Response has a Lockfile/package-manager behavior section documenting canonical package manager use and whether the change came from direct upgrade, override/resolution, or lockfile-only refresh.
Response says to run fresh install/audit, focused image-processing tests, and project tests/typecheck, then record exact commands and results in deps.md.
